title: $META_IN_TRX
text: $META_IN_TRX Set the data storage format of String fields with the U* packing code to XML or TRX. $META_IN_TRX { = } 1 | 0 Arguments 0 —storage format of String fields with U* packing code is XML. This is the default. 1 —storage format of String fields with U* packing code is TRX. Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 0 Description Data in a String field with packing code U n are always stored into the database in TRX format.
